title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 426.060 - Additional property, duty of assignee
text:
426.060.  Additional property, duty of assignee. — If, after making the first inventory, any other property, effects and things conveyed by the deed of assignment shall come to the possession or knowledge of the assignee, his duty in relation thereto, and the duty of the court or judge, and the appraisers, shall be the same as is required of them by this chapter.
(RSMo 1939 § 5744) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 5634; 1919 § 630; 1909 § 903
